---
pagetitle: "Tau Mutant Integration"
output-file: tau-mutant-integration.html
format:
  html:
    theme: assets/theme.scss # deep-blue chrome + IBM Plex (Sans body, Serif headings, Mono code; inlined offline)
    embed-resources: true    # inline CSS/JS -> ONE self-contained offline HTML file
    lightbox: auto           # dense figures are clickable in the offline HTML
    toc: false
    anchor-sections: false   # visible headings stay plain "Figure N" labels, no hover anchor chrome
    code-fold: true          # each echoed chunk -> native <details> "Code" toggle (offline HTML, no JS); include:false setup stays hidden
execute:
  echo: true                 # show plotting code as folded/togglable blocks; figures remain the default view
---

{{< include sections/microglia.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/trajectory.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/modality.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/state-decomposition.qmd >}}
